title: Xtra Garlicky Mediterranean Chicken Sandwich
description: A cozy Mediterranean dish featuring garlicky chicken, velvety sauce, and a crispy baguette, made with low sodium ingredients and a double fry method inspired by KFC.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together minced garlic, lemon juice, and olive oil to make the marinade.
Add the chicken breast to the marinade and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the marinade and coat with low sodium chicken seasoning.
Double fry the chicken by frying at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 5 minutes, then increasing the temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and frying for an additional 5 minutes.
Slice the baguette into 4 inch pieces and toast until crispy.
Assemble the sandwich by spreading a layer of feta cheese on the toasted baguette, then adding a piece of fried chicken, a slice of tomato, and a sprinkle of chopped lettuce.
Garnish with additional garlic and lemon juice if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
